title: Come Sweet Death
wikitext:
[]: Come, Sweet Death             Quote Post by Asuka1998 » Wed Mar 09, 2016 8:00 pm Ok, I hate to say this but I personally think this song was better than Cruel Angel Thesis. No song has never made me so depressed before. But what is this song exactly about? I'm pretty sure that it's a song about Shinji's life but can anybody go deeper then this?

[]: Re: Come, Sweet Death             Quote Post by Ray » Thu Mar 10, 2016 1:32 am It's about song about teen suicide done in an upbeat and happy way. What more is there to say? I can post a link to a line by line breakdown of the lyrics if you want.

[]: Re: Come, Sweet Death             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Thu Mar 10, 2016 2:17 am These days I can't listen to that damn song anymore, though I'm not quite sure if that's because it's such an insidious earworm or because it takes me to a dark place.

[]: Re: Come, Sweet Death             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Mar 10, 2016 6:33 am Ray wrote: I can post a link to a line by line breakdown of the lyrics if you want.

[]: Re: Come, Sweet Death             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Thu Mar 10, 2016 7:02 am Asuka1998 wrote: Ok, I hate to say this but I personally think this song was better than Cruel Angel Thesis. No song has never made me so depressed before. But what is this song exactly about? I'm pretty sure that it's a song about Shinji's life but can anybody go deeper then this?

[]: Re: Come, Sweet Death             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Mar 10, 2016 8:12 am Asuka1998 wrote: Ok, I hate to say this but I personally think this song was better than Cruel Angel Thesis.

[]: Re: Come, Sweet Death             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Mar 10, 2016 12:42 pm I always thought it was a good song. It never made me depressed. If a song makes you depressed, then you have some serious issues.

[]: Re: Come, Sweet Death             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Thu Mar 10, 2016 12:50 pm robersora wrote: I remember reading somewhere, that Anno wrote the lyrics in Japanese and somebody translated them, heavily altered.

[]: Re: Come, Sweet Death             Quote Post by zlink64 » Thu Mar 10, 2016 1:40 pm BrikHaus wrote: I always thought it was a good song. It never made me depressed. If a song makes you depressed, then you have some serious issues.

[]: Re: Come, Sweet Death             Quote Post by CarlosIXA » Thu Mar 10, 2016 4:34 pm I don't know, but I've always felt that the upbeat tone was almost insincere, like a depressed adult with tears crawling down the sides of his/her cheeks attempting to smile serenely. As if trying to hide the pain under a fake mask of happiness. That's how I've always felt about the song, though. Honestly, from what I've been reading on here, it seems that I'm the only one that feels this way about the song.

[]: Re: Come, Sweet Death             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Thu Mar 10, 2016 5:54 pm Not sure how anyone could interpret the song's tone as anything but bitterly ironic

[]: Re: Come, Sweet Death             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Mar 10, 2016 8:24 pm ^ Ironic, could be; but first and foremost it feels cathartic. Very fitting for Third Impact, imo.

[]: Re: Come, Sweet Death             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Mar 11, 2016 5:33 pm zlink64 wrote: I don't think it's weird for a song to make a person feel stuff negative or positive.

[]: Re: Come, Sweet Death             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 12, 2016 4:16 am CarlosIXA wrote: I don't know, but I've always felt that the upbeat tone was almost insincere, (...) As if trying to hide the pain under a fake mask of happiness.

[]: Re: Come, Sweet Death             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Sat Mar 12, 2016 4:55 am For those who don't know, the song's title is another Bach reference - the original "Come, Sweet Death" is a religious song about... well, see for yourself .

[]: Re: Come, Sweet Death             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Mar 12, 2016 5:01 am Indeed, it was searching for a particular version of Bach's setting of the hymn and finding this song that first brought me to Evangelion , and thence to anime and manga in general.

[]: Re: Come, Sweet Death             Quote Post by Asuka1998 » Sun Mar 13, 2016 11:13 am robersora wrote: Why do you hate to say this, are you afraid of your own opinion? If so, why did you open a thread for something you hate to say? Is it some form of therapy? Im really intrigued.

[]: Re: Come, Sweet Death             Quote Post by robersora » Sun Mar 13, 2016 11:51 am ^ I like Komm, süßer Tod a lot, too. Actually I like it so much, I'm in the process of learning it to play with the piano... But as playing the piano is not one of my strengths, it's rather difficult. But I'll get there!

No song has never made me so depressed before. But what is this song exactly about? I'm pretty sure that it's a song about Shinji's life but can anybody go deeper then this?
